prompt: Refactor the database queries in db.py to use parameterized queries instead of string formatting. There are SQL injection vulnerabilities.

assertions.text: Response includes a numbered plan or step list before showing code changes
All SQL queries in the proposed code use ? or %s placeholders instead of string formatting
Response does NOT rename functions, add docstrings, restructure the module, or add error handling beyond what is needed for parameterization
All 6 functions in db.py have their queries converted to parameterized form
